entities.name: EXPERIMENTAL GAMES
entities.description: Games used to explore community solutions and farmer behavior regarding resource management

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: The participants in the experimental games who make crop and investment decisions

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: The essential resource required for growing crops

entities.name: SOCIAL OPTIMAL INVESTMENT LEVEL
entities.description: The investment level in the game that allows all players to grow water-efficient crops

entities.name: RABI
entities.description: The post-rainy season during which certain crops are grown

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A water-efficient crop grown during the rabi season

entities.name: WATER-EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The attribute of requiring less water for growth

entities.name: WATER-INTENSITY
entities.description: The attribute of requiring significant amounts of water for growth

entities.name: UNCOOPERATIVE ACTION
entities.description: The decision to grow water-intensive crops over water-efficient ones in the game context
